title: Data Structures & Algorithms Mastery
description: A comprehensive guide to mastering DSA for technical interviews, covering everything from arrays to dynamic programming.
advice: Consistency is key. Don't just read solutions; try to solve them for at least 30 minutes before looking at hints. Understand the time and space complexity of every approach.

subGoals.title: Master Arrays, Strings, & Hashing
subGoals.description: Build a rock-solid foundation in linear data structures and hash-based lookups.

subGoals.title: Master Pointers, Sliding Window, & Stacks
subGoals.description: Two-pointer, sliding window, and monotonic stack patterns.

subGoals.title: Master Trees, Tries, & Heaps
subGoals.description: Hierarchical structures, priority queues, and prefix trees.

subGoals.title: Mock Interviews & Advanced Topics
subGoals.description: Timed mocks, system-design-lite, and recap of weak areas.

tasks.title: Solve 2 Easy Array/String Problems
tasks.description: Warm up daily with two easy problems to build pattern recognition.
tasks.notes: Track time taken per problem to spot weak topics.

tasks.title: Two Pointers & Sliding Window Practice
tasks.description: Focused medium-difficulty drills on the two flagship patterns.

tasks.title: Weekly Review of Missed Problems
tasks.description: Re-attempt every problem you failed during the week.
tasks.notes: Keep a spaced-repetition log so missed problems resurface in 7 / 21 / 60 days.
